THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_THREE_LEGGED_RAC: This turn, whenever you gain Energy, the other player draws that many cards. Whenever they spend Energy, you discard that many cards.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_BURN_THE_MOUNTAI: Your played cards are Exhausted. Whenever you play another card, add a random card from another character to your hand.
Your played cards are Exhausted. Whenever you play another card, add a random {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]upgraded[/gold] |}card from another character to your hand.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_FIND_SOMEONE_TO_: Whenever you play a card you have already played this turn, add {Amount} [gold]Human[/gold] cards to your hand.
Whenever you play a 0-cost card, play {Amount} Bouncing Flask bounce effects against an enemy. Removed at the end of the turn.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_COUPLING_POWER.d: Whenever you [blue]Evoke[/blue] an orb, trigger the passive ability of every remaining orb {Amount} times.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_PRESS_FORWARD_PO: Upgrade your [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold]. While [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] is in your hand, you must play it before other cards.
This turn, you can only play cards tied for the highest Energy cost in your hand.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_VAKUU_TEACHES_U_: If you play cards from left to right this turn, retain all your Block and your hand. You may skip cards that cannot be played.
